value: Milestone M1D (News & Catalysts) added to evaluate.py on 2026-03-16. fetch_news.py fetches headlines from UW (Yahoo fallback), classifies each for material catalysts (BUYBACK, M&A, EARNINGS_BEAT, EARNINGS_MISS, GUIDANCE, FDA, etc.) and sentiment (BULLISH/BEARISH/NEUTRAL). Integrated as parallel milestone in evaluate.py. Context-only — does NOT gate edge determination, but surfaces catalysts and sentiment alignment in the edge output for operator judgment. Key insight: CRM 5B buyback was invisible without news context, making alternating DP flow look like noise when it was actually buyback-driven accumulation.
